title: AI UX Brief Builder
description: Answer five lenses — trust, agency, errors, transparency, adaptation — and get a complete, exportable design brief for any AI-powered feature. Built for UX practitioners navigating the human-to-AI shift.
rationale: Every UX team building AI features reinvents the same five decisions from scratch. This tool makes those decisions explicit, forces intentionality, and outputs a shareable brief that aligns teams before a single pixel is designed. Directly useful for Designing for Tomorrow readers who are in practice.
